title: AAYS 112 parcel elevation evidence export fresh 1535
scope: Run the existing AAYS 112 parcel elevation evidence exporter. Produce Excel, CSV, JSON and markdown report for parcel elevation evidence from local parcel geometry and DEM/DTM files. Read-only execution. Do not write database. Do not deploy. Do not invent elevation values. If DEM or geometry is missing, produce blocker report and candidate inventory instead of guessed values.
wait_minutes_after_start: 10-20; allow up to 30-40 if DEM/DTM scan is large
self_correction_rules: If DEM raster is missing, report exact blocker and candidate DEM search paths.
If parcel geometry is missing or unreadable, report exact blocker and candidate geometry files.
If geospatial dependencies are missing, still write CSV/XLSX blocker table and JSON report.
If one candidate fails, continue with remaining candidates.
